Be a Member Member Portal
Community

Your people are already here.

For brands, service providers, nonprofits, job seekers, and students. Starting at $49/year.

Naturally Rising · 350-person audience

Why it's worth it

Membership is a Tuesday morning coffee with someone who just solved your exact problem.

It's a Slack message at 9pm that actually gets answered. It's walking into Naturally Rising and realizing the whole room is rooting for you.

Free or discounted entry to every NSD event

Naturally Rising, Networking Nights, Morning Mingles, Office Hours, Founder Series, Fall Fling. All included.

The Naturally Network, nationwide

Your SD membership travels. Connect with chapters in New York, NorCal, Colorado, and beyond.

Member & Sponsor Directory

Search the whole community by industry, role, and company type. Your next collaborator is in here.

Members-only Slack

Where the community actually lives between events. Real questions, real answers. Usually within the hour.

The room, and everyone in it

Investors, co-manufacturers, retailers, and founders who've already been where you're headed.

Job Board via ForceBrands

Post jobs for free. Cross-post to 5,000+ natural products professionals at a 20% member discount.

Membership Tiers

There's a seat for everyone.

Brands, service providers, nonprofits, job seekers, students. Pick the tier that fits.

Individual

Brand

Companies that make a physical CPG product sold DTC or in retail.

$99 / year
Apply →

Individual

Service Provider

Companies that provide a service to natural products brands: marketing, legal, packaging, brokerage, and more.

$299 / year
Apply →

Individual

Non-Profit Partner Org.

For local San Diego nonprofits: food banks, farms, entrepreneur support organizations, and similar.

$99 / year
Apply →

Individual

Job Seeker

Valid for 1 year. You must be actively looking for a job within the SD natural products community.

$99 / year
Apply →

Individual

College Student

For current college students interested in the natural products and CPG industry.

$49 / year
Apply →

Individual

Sponsorship Packages

For brands and businesses looking to amplify their presence across the entire NSD community. Packages from $1,000/year.

From $1,000 / year
View Packages →

Frequently Asked Questions

Who is membership for?

Natural products brands, CPG founders, and the service providers who support them: investors, agencies, lawyers, consultants, brokers, and more. We also have options for nonprofits, job seekers, and college students.

What's the difference between Brand and Service Provider membership?

Brand membership ($99/year) is for natural products companies and their founders. Service Provider membership ($299/year) is for businesses that support the industry: agencies, law firms, banks, consultants, and similar.

Do I need to be based in San Diego?

San Diego-area members get the most out of local events, but membership includes access to the full Naturally Network, with chapters across the US. Remote-friendly members welcome.

How do I access the Slack community?

After joining, you'll receive an invite to the members-only Slack channel. Contact info@naturallysandiego.org if you have trouble.

Is the Job Seeker membership renewable?

The Job Seeker membership is valid for 1 year and is intended for active job seekers within the SD natural products community.

Ready to do more?

Sponsorship puts your brand in front of the whole community. Every event, every email, across the entire ecosystem.
